title: ononis natrix subsp. microphylla
intro: Ononis natrix subsp. microphylla, commonly known as a small-flowered ononis, is a subspecies of the Ononis natrix plant, which is a type of legume in the pea family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which may contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Ononis natrix subsp. microphylla include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Ononis natrix subsp. microphylla have been used in various forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
